author: codex-agent

patch.value: Extract create templates into installable pm package
Move template save/list/show and create-template acceleration into a pm-templates package using public SDK helpers, with core retaining compatibility fallback during migration.

pm-templates package is TypeScript-authored and installable; installed package handles templates commands through dynamic command registration; SDK exposes needed stable helpers without internal deep imports; core fallback remains compatible; focused tests and temp-project dogfood pass.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-05-14: pm search templates package extraction found only closed templates feature/issues plus parent pm-59gj; net-new extraction child under pm-59gj and selected as first implementation slice.

message: Plan and start package extraction: templates

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implementation approach: adding a bundled pm-templates package that registers templates/list/save/show handlers via public SDK types and runtime helpers; keeping the current core templates command as a compatibility fallback while installed package contracts prove the extraction path.

value.note: templates package runtime via public SDK
first-party package manifest and import hygiene coverage

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Focused verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/templates-command.spec.ts tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-dynamic-package-actions.spec.ts (67 tests).

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/templates-command.spec.ts tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-dynamic-package-actions.spec.ts
value.note: focused templates package extraction and dynamic contract coverage
package-first temp-project dogfood covers templates package commands

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Dogfood verification passed: node scripts/dogfood-package-first.mjs completed 40 isolated temp-project commands, including install templates, templates save/show package commands, install all, package catalog/doctor, Beads/Todos package commands, upgrade, SDK import, linked test, health, validate, close, and release.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Coverage sweep found one stale integration expectation: install-all now installs 3 bundled packages after adding pm-templates. Updated tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts and rerunning coverage.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Focused integration rerun found the shell-expanded wildcard assertion also expected 2 bundled packages; updated it to 3 and rerunning the integration file before coverage.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Full coverage passed after updating install-all expectations: node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage => 92 files, 1297 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Release gate passed: node scripts/release/run-gates.mjs --telemetry-mode required --max-sentry-critical 10 --max-sentry-high 20 --max-telemetry-error-rate 10 --json. Checks passed: build, typecheck, docs/skills, static quality, coverage, version policy, secret scan, npx smoke, npm pack dry-run, compatibility, and Sentry/telemetry. Sentry current actionable counts stayed within threshold: critical=1, high=3, total=4; telemetry required mode ok with finish_error_rate_pct=2.4 and zero missing error-code rows.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Post-gate health follow-up: pm validate --check-history-drift now reports only the five known historical hash mismatches (pm-54d, pm-f3q4, pm-fdla, pm-mb4n, pm-tq1). pm reindex --mode hybrid --progress refreshed search status with 707 unchanged items and stale_items=0.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: pm-templates package extracted and verified: TypeScript package added, installed package command handlers tested, SDK helper preserved, temp-project dogfood and full release gates passed

message: Close: pm-templates package extracted with dogfood, coverage, release gate, telemetry, and Sentry evidence

patch.value: Extracted create-template functionality into the TypeScript-authored pm-templates package while preserving core compatibility fallback.
pm-templates installs and handles templates list/save/show through dynamic package command registration with public SDK helpers.
Focused package tests, isolated dogfood, full coverage, release gates, Sentry/telemetry, health, and reindex evidence passed during the extraction run.
